mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO doctor_schedule ( id, doctor_id, patient_id, schedule, schedule_category, schedule_day, priority, status, result, create_time, update_time, version, ext ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.doctorId}, #{item.patientId}, #{item.schedule}, #{item.scheduleCategory}, #{item.scheduleDay}, #{item.priority}, #{item.status}, #{item.result}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.version}, #{item.ext, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.Fastjson2TypeHandler} )

INSERT IGNORE INTO doctor_schedule ( id, doctor_id, patient_id, schedule, schedule_category, schedule_day, priority, status, result, create_time, update_time, version, ext ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.doctorId}, #{item.patientId}, #{item.schedule}, #{item.scheduleCategory}, #{item.scheduleDay}, #{item.priority}, #{item.status}, #{item.result}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.version}, #{item.ext, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.Fastjson2TypeHandler} )

INSERT INTO doctor_schedule ( id, doctor_id, patient_id, schedule, schedule_category, schedule_day, priority, status, result, create_time, update_time, version, ext ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.doctorId}, #{item.patientId}, #{item.schedule}, #{item.scheduleCategory}, #{item.scheduleDay}, #{item.priority}, #{item.status}, #{item.result}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.version}, #{item.ext, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.Fastjson2TypeHandler} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE doctor_id = VALUES(doctor_id), patient_id = VALUES(patient_id), schedule = VALUES(schedule), schedule_category = VALUES(schedule_category), schedule_day = VALUES(schedule_day), priority = VALUES(priority), status = VALUES(status), result = VALUES(result), update_time = VALUES(update_time), version = version + 1, ext = VALUES(ext)

INSERT INTO doctor_schedule
id, doctor_id, patient_id, schedule, schedule_category, schedule_day, priority, status, result, create_time, update_time, version, ext,
VALUES
#{item.id}, #{item.doctorId}, #{item.patientId}, #{item.schedule}, #{item.scheduleCategory}, #{item.scheduleDay}, #{item.priority}, #{item.status}, #{item.result}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.version},
#{item.ext, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.Fastjson2TypeHandler},

INSERT INTO doctor_schedule ( id, doctor_id, patient_id, schedule, schedule_category, schedule_day, priority, status, result, create_time, update_time, version, ext ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.doctorId}, #{item.patientId}, #{item.schedule}, #{item.scheduleCategory}, #{item.scheduleDay}, #{item.priority}, #{item.status}, #{item.result}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.version}, #{item.ext, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.Fastjson2TypeHandler} )
